s: In 1992, Dennis Moeller suited up for KCR as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 7.000, WHIP 1.940, SO 6, WAR -0.500.
Changed teams after the previous season (KCR -> PIT).
In 1993, Dennis Moeller suited up for PIT as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 9.920, WHIP 2.020, SO 13, WAR 0.000. Notable context: Joined PIT.
